items.title: The Hawks are 3-0 in Vegas after beating the Celtics.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks are 3-0 in Vegas after beating the Celtics.

Kobe Johnson was the standout for the shorthanded Hawks with 30 (!) points, 7 rebounds, 4 assists, and 3 stocks.

Henri Veesaar also had his most productive SL game with 20 points (and 4 threes).

Locked On Hawks to come tonight.

items.title: Mo Amini is about to check in for the Celtics, meaning all 14 available players will have gotten minutes today against the Hawks.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Mo Amini is about to check in for the Celtics, meaning all 14 available players will have gotten minutes today against the Hawks.

The second half of a b2b -- coupled with how this game has gone -- was a good opportunity for Boston to get everyone some floor time.

items.title: Back-to-back blocks by Chris Cenac Jr. He now has 4 on the day.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Back-to-back blocks by Chris Cenac Jr. He now has 4 on the day.

It has been a tough game for him overall, and he has had his hands full against Henri Veesaar, but he's up to 16 points, 4 rebounds, and 4 blocks.
